programme.desc: Siblings say their mother chooses alcohol over them, and with their father headed to prison, they are afraid their family will fall apart if she does not get her act together.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.sub-title: My Husband's Big Lottery Win Is Ruining Our Marriage
programme.desc: A woman says that ever since her husband won $1.66 million in a lottery pool, he has become angry, distant and secretive.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.sub-title: Badmouthing, Bruises and a Bitter Custody Battle: What Does the Neighbor Say?
programme.desc: Divorced mother Sandra says her daughters tell her worrisome things after visiting with their father, and she fears for their lives.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.sub-title: A Bitter Custody Battle: Claims of Poison in Ice Cream, a Child Wrapped in a Garbage Bag and Inappropriate Touching
programme.desc: Dr. Phil offers polygraph and drug tests to Joey and his ex-wife, Sandra, who accuses him of abuse, neglect and inappropriate conduct with their two young daughters.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.sub-title: The Pastor, His Wife, the Call Girl & the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Marissa says her father, a former pastor, had an affair and visited porn and call-girl websites, and she urges her mother to divorce him; a bounty hunter adds detail to the case.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: The Doctor, His Wife, His Mistress, the Murder
programme.desc: Gypsy Willis, the former mistress of a doctor recently convicted in the 2007 murder of his wife, discusses the case and her own 2009 conviction of fraud.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: Love, Lies and Murder: Killer Doctor's Daughter Reacts to Mistress Interview
programme.desc: A daughter of Dr. Martin MacNeill tells why she helped prosecutors build a case against him in the death of her mother and reacts to Dr. Phil's interview with her father's former mistress, Gypsy Willis.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: A Family Slaughtered for Teen Love: The Convicted Daughter Speaks Out
programme.desc: Erin Caffey speaks out from prison about the night her boyfriend and two accomplices brutally killed her mother and younger brothers and shot her father, who also discusses the ordeal.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: My Family Slaughtered for My Daughter's Teenage Love: Can a Father Forgive?
programme.desc: Erin Caffey discusses her role in the brutal murders of her mother and younger brothers and how she felt when she learned that her father survived; her ex-boyfriend makes a shocking claim.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.desc: The birth mother and stepmother of a 5-year-old boy said to have been locked in a closet and starved nearly to death tell their sides of the story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.desc: The birth mother and stepmother of a 5-year-old boy said to have been locked in a closet and starved nearly to death tell their sides of the story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: Vanished on Vacation: Beautiful Blonde Goes Missing in Aruba
programme.desc: Dr. Phil sits down with Gary Giordano, who was considered the prime suspect in the disappearance of traveling companion Robyn Gardner in 2011 Aruba, and offers him a polygraph test.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.sub-title: Exclusive: Cannabis Induced Psychosis: Bryn Spejcher Speaks Out
programme.desc: Dr. Phil holds an exclusive interview with Bryn Spejcher and explores the impact of today's more potent marijuana.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.sub-title: Marijuana's Lethal Consequences: The Exclusive Interview With Bryn Spejcher
programme.desc: Bryn Spejcher discusses the night she stabbed her friend 108 times in a cannabis-induced psychosis.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: A growing movement of parents removing children from traditional schools for a controversial, child-led, homeschool education called, unschooling.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.sub-title: America Divided: The Cancel Culture War
programme.desc: Dr. Phil dives into one of the most heated topics of recent times, the cancel culture.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: An eye-opening Dr. Phil debate; celebrating figures in medicine tackle, diversity, equity, and inclusion, some pressing issues in health care today.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Heartbreaking stories from hard working Americans who are struggling to financially survive due to an inflated cost of living.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.sub-title: Armed & Dangerous: Colorado Town Overrun by a Criminal Gang?
programme.desc: Bringing to light the harrowing experiences of Cindy, a former resident of a Colorado apartment complex and her allegations of escalating violence and the presence of a Venezuelan gang.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.sub-title: Adderall and Other Stimulants: America's Next Opioid Crisis?
programme.desc: The Adderall crisis; the use of this stimulant has exploded from 35.5 million prescriptions in 2019 to 45 million in 2022; these numbers only scratch the surface; the DEA warns.

programme.title: Ancient Nutrition
programme.desc: Burning up to 15% more calories at rest by combining three ancient superfoods.

programme.title: Sleep Science

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.sub-title: I'm Afraid My Daughter Was Kidnapped by Her Survivalist Boyfriend

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.sub-title: My Ex-Wife Claims I Molested Our Daughter Who Ran Off With Her Boyfriend
programme.desc: Eighteen-year-old Alexis' biological father says her mother, Gina, accused him of molesting her when she was a toddler, and he wants to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.sub-title: Accusations of Compulsive Lies, False Charges and Coaching: A Dad's Fears About His Daughter's Safety at Mom's House
programme.desc: Dr. Phil tries to get parents mired in a contentious custody battle to put their 4-year-old daughter's needs ahead of their own.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.sub-title: Mom vs. Dad: Why Lynsey Storms Off
programme.desc: A woman caught in a contentious custody battle with her 4-year-old daughter's father walks off stage; Dr. Phil asks the former couple to take polygraph tests.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.sub-title: Police Called 100 Times on Our Car-Stealing, Drug-Taking, Dad-Beating, Beautiful 15-Year-Old, Who Is Now Corrupting Her Younger Sister
programme.desc: Parents say they fear for their family's lives, as 15-year-old Madison assaults them, uses drugs, and was in a high-speed car chase that ended in the car being totaled.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.sub-title: Double Trouble: Two Teen Sisters and Their Backstage Drama
programme.desc: Madison's parents say she now corrupts her 13-year-old sister, who has harsh words for them as emotions run high.

programme.sub-title: Mysteriously, Their Children Died Three Months Apart: Dad Thinks Mom Is to Blame
programme.desc: Julia and Codey vehemently deny any wrongdoing in the mysterious deaths of their 1-year-old son and 4-year-old daughter three months apart.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: Parents Accused of Murder: Will Julia and Codey Take the Polygraph Test?
programme.desc: Parents of two toddlers who died mysteriously, three months apart, are offered the opportunity to take lie-detector tests to clear their names.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: The Night Four Girls Went Into the Woods and Only Three Came Out Alive
programme.desc: A 17-year-old girl is sentenced to 23 years behind bars for luring a friend into the woods and killing her; Shemida, whose family accuses her of fabricating health problems for attention, returns to the show.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: Exclusive: The Vanderbilt Football Player's Interview From Behind Bars
programme.desc: One of two former Vanderbilt University football players who were found guilty of raping an unconscious female classmate in a campus dorm room after a night of drinking tells his story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: The Student and the Professor: Is One Stalking the Other?
programme.desc: Dr. Phil tries to unravel the truth about a toxic relationship between a professor and one of her students.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: Exclusive: The Co-Eds and the Catfish
programme.desc: Seven college students face the man with whom they fell in love online, but never met in person; he, too, says he was victimized, by a catfish who stole his identity; the real person who lured the young women into fake relationships comes forward.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: 15-Year-Old Runs Away With Her Friend's Dad: The Amber Alert, the Search and the Rescue
programme.desc: Calah Waskow, 15, made national news when she was abducted by her friend's 37-year-old father; Calah was found safe five days later, but many questions remained; Calah tells her story in an exclusive interview.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.sub-title: Dance Moms and Beyond: Abby Lee Miller On Fame, Fallout, and Moving Forward
programme.desc: 'Dance Moms' diva Abby Lee Miller sits down with Dr. Phil to share her past, her prison time, and what's next for the reality tv star.

programme.desc: Dr. Phil, Calley Means of Truemed, nutritionist Dr. Cate Shanahan, and fitness expert Jillian Michaels discuss a chronic illness epidemic sweeping the U.S.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.sub-title: Make America Healthy Again: Inside Our Country's Food Crisis
programme.desc: Dr. Phil gives guidance to two mothers who illustrate the importance of the Make America Healthy Again initiative.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime

programme.desc: Why are so many families breaking apart-and is social media making it even harder to heal?

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr. Phil shines a light on remarkable achievements and inspiring stories of extraordinary young people across the nation.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.sub-title: Father Figures: Dr. Phil and Steve Harvey
programme.desc: Dr. Phil joins Steve Harvey to guide 250 teens at the Steve Harvey Mentoring Camp, teaching them to become responsible, ambitious men. They inspire young men raised in single female-headed homes to reach their full potential.

programme.title: Dr. Phil's Golden Opportunity With Preserve Gold
programme.desc: Tariffs, inflation and fear of recession have sent gold prices through the roof; learning why so many people turn to precious metals in time of financial uncertainty.

programme.title: Ancient Nutrition

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.sub-title: Accused of Faking Pregnancies and Baby Deaths: Amie's Explosive Reaction
programme.desc: Courtney and Amie come face to face for the first time in two years, and Amie tries to prove she is telling the truth about losing five babies.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.desc: Dr. Phil McGraw invites guests to confront their problems.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.sub-title: I'm Afraid of My Violent, Video Game Addicted Son
programme.desc: Jennifer says her 12-year-old son's violent gaming addiction is not only exacerbating his numerous behavioral issues, but she fears it may be the catalyst for him becoming the next school shooter; Dr. Phil sits down with the boy.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.sub-title: Arrested for Keying Her Ex-Boyfriend's Car
programme.desc: Autumn claims she was pushed to the point of insanity after being stuck in a cycle of abuse for almost two years, when, she says, her ex-boyfriend, D'Andre, choked her, head-butted her and sexually assaulted her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with D'Andre, who claims that his abusive relationship with his girlfriend, Autumn, is partly due to what he calls her "messed up" upbringing.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: Mentally Ill or Monster? Teen Convicted of Murdering Mom With a Sledgehammer Speaks
programme.desc: Teen Zachary Davis sits down with Dr. Phil to reveal disturbing details of the night he killed his mother with a sledgehammer and to discuss what drove him to do it.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: A Baby Ripped From the Womb: One Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: Michelle Wilkins tells of having her unborn baby cut from her womb after she answered an online ad offering free maternity clothes.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: Adopted Twin, Beaten, Strangled, Starved and Locked in a Room: The Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Tina says her children lived in a house of horrors with their father and stepmother; two of the eldest speak out for the first time about the conditions they say they endured.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: Teacher Guilty of Sleeping With Student Is Now Suing Him!
programme.desc: Former teacher Tanya Ramirez, who had sex with a 17-year-old who attended the school where she taught, sues him and his mother, and they face off on stage.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: Schoolyard Setup Exclusive: Drugs Planted in a PTA Mom's Car
programme.desc: Former PTA president Kelli says that after a school spat, fellow parents framed her by stashing bags of drugs in her car; one of them, who has served time for her part in the incident, speaks out for the first time.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: The Girl in the Box: Kala Brown's Story of Being Abducted by a Suspected Serial Killer
programme.desc: Kala Brown, who made national headlines when she was discovered alive two months after she mysteriously disappeared in South Carolina, speaks out for the first time in an exclusive interview about her life in captivity.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: The Girl in the Box: Kala Brown's Story of Abduction by a Suspected Serial Killer, Her Dramatic Rescue
programme.desc: After spending more than two months locked in a metal storage container, Kala Brown continues to tell her story of captivity, her fight to survive and her dramatic rescue.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Exploring grief: its unpredictability and the absence of a right way to process it; a young wife and mother diagnosed with ovarian cancer.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.sub-title: 40 Years Behind Bars: Patty Prewitt Finally Free
programme.desc: Patty Prewitt is freed from prison, 40 years after being convicted of murdering her husband.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.sub-title: Loving the Machine - When AI Becomes Human
